content: Intrinsic curiosity signals from ICM/RND curiosity-driven RL can be repurposed as dynamic pruning and prioritization gates for 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where surprising, high-prediction-error experiences get retained in fast episodic memory while predictable, low-value observations are discarded to avoid bloat. This creates a self-tuning memory system that does not require manual design of retention rules.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
